raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a DBO account with XXXX XXXX for {$490.00}. I never received the card or the service that was supposed to be provided. This was in XX/XX/XXXX. The company went out of business in XX/XX/XXXX, never providing services and the phone numbers are not in service. I submitted a dispute with American Express and was told it was greater than 60 days since purchase to contact the company. I told them I can't. They won't do anything further.
